arts.ttl: Aston Villa transfer target has already revealed his demands for a Villa Park switch
arts.sum: The 24-year-old's agent, Nick Mavromaras, has made the forward's wage demands clear, stating that he must be guaranteed a pay-check of €6 million over five years in addition to commissions and signing bonuses since the Canadian will be a free agent come summer 2025. Long-time Aston Villa transfer target Jonathan David has outlined his wage demands, according to TuttoSport, ahead of his contract expiry next summer.

arts.ttl: Monchi: ‘Douglas Luiz will become important for Juventus’
arts.sum: Aston Villa’s Sporting Director Monchi shared his thoughts on the upcoming Champions League clash with Juventus in an interview with Gazzetta dello Sport. The former Roma executive expressed confidence in his team’s ability to compete with the Italian giants, despite their recent improvement under new manager Thiago Motta. “Juventus is Juventus,” Monchi stated. “They’re gradually finding their way after the arrival of a manager with a different idea. It’s increasingly becoming Thiago’s team, and now they’re much stronger compared to two months ago. Plus, they need points in the Champions League: it will be a very difficult match.” When asked The post Monchi: ‘Douglas Luiz will become important for Juventus’ appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: “I would take Luiz back” – Monchi drops big Douglas Luiz to Aston Villa transfer bombshell
arts.sum: Douglas Luiz left Aston Villa in the summer transfer window and his time at Juventus has been a disaster so far. Currently injured, the Brazilian has had poor performances that have resulted in him giving away penalties and he also had his house burgled some weeks ago. arts.ttl: Aston Villa 'mistakes', Luiz transfer, injuries - Every word Unai Emery said in Juventus press conference - Birmingham Live
arts.sum: "I like this format a lot in the Champions League because I think a lot of teams can have more and more options to try to correct some mistakes by playing eight matches. "But normally at the end, the matches played in this competition and the first round of Europe, I think more or less maybe there can be some surprises, but usually the better teams will be there."
